summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of AVO Jerseys design overhaul. All requested features verified: Hero slideshow (4 images, 5s auto-transition), Space Grotesk font, dot indicators, CTA buttons, 3 category cards, Popular Teams carousel (14 teams in rounded squares), Featured Products with lime In Stock indicator, Benefits section, and 360° Preview correctly removed from Products page.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All design overhaul features tested and working. Hero slideshow auto-transitions every 5 seconds. 360° Preview has been removed from Products page. Popular Teams carousel shows 14 teams with logos in rounded square cards. Promo popup appears on page load - dismiss with 'Nu ma intereseaza'. Drop Casual button opens countdown modal for future collection launch.

hero_slideshow.details: 4 background images (stadium scenes), auto-transitions every 5 seconds with fade effect

space_grotesk_font.details: Space Grotesk font applied to hero title (TRICOURI DE / FOTBAL / PENTRU ADEVĂRAȚII FANI)

slideshow_dots.details: 4 dot indicators visible, clickable, active dot has lime color (#CCFF00) and wider width

hero_cta_vezi_colectia.details: Lime button navigates to /products page correctly

hero_cta_drop_casual.details: Opens countdown modal with launch date 01/04/2026

categories_section.details: 3 category cards (Echipe de Club, Naționale, Retro) with hover effects and lime underline animation

popular_teams_carousel.details: 14 teams displayed in rounded square cards with proper logos: Real Madrid, Barcelona, Manchester United, Liverpool, PSG, Bayern Munich, Juventus, AC Milan, Arsenal, Chelsea, Manchester City, Inter Milan, Atletico Madrid, Borussia Dortmund

carousel_navigation.details: Left/right arrows appear conditionally and scroll carousel smoothly

featured_products.details: 4 featured products displayed with lime In Stock indicator dot

benefits_section.details: Dark background section with 3 benefits (Livrare Rapidă, Plată Securizată, Produse Premium) with lime icons

products_page_360_removed.details: 360° Preview banner NO LONGER exists on Products page (correctly removed)

products_page_filters.details: Category filters work (Toate Produsele, Echipe de Club, Echipe Naționale, Colecția Retro, Limited Edition, Bundle 1+1)

products_page_quick_view.details: Quick View button appears on product hover, modal opens with kit selection and sizes

screenshots: .screenshots/07_quick_view_modal.png - Quick View modal with kit/size selection
.screenshots/10_slideshow_t5.png - Hero at T=5.5s (dot 1 active - different image)
.screenshots/11_teams_carousel_detail.png - Teams carousel with logos in rounded squares
.screenshots/12_teams_carousel_scrolled.png - Teams carousel after scrolling (Inter Milan, Atletico, Dortmund)
